sub_methods.name: Step-level Forward Noising
sub_methods.description: Forward noising process for CoT using reward-ranked candidates to inject noise into reasoning steps

sub_methods.name: Reward-ranked Candidate Collection
sub_methods.description: Collecting candidates by reward scores for the forward noising process

sub_methods.name: Diffusion Sliding-Window Mechanism
sub_methods.description: Sliding window applied to iteratively denoise past steps while generating new ones

sub_methods.name: Causal Diffusion Noise
sub_methods.description: Noise mechanism to strengthen causal consistency across reasoning steps

relations.evidence: We first present a step-level forward noising process for CoT using reward-ranked candidates (§3.1)
step-level forward noising process for CoT using reward-ranked candidates
then apply a diffusion sliding window to iteratively denoise past steps while generating new ones (§3.2)
We further introduce causal diffusion noise to strengthen causal consistency across reasoning steps (§3.3)
